verification_approved: Aapka account verify ho gaya! Ab aap {action_text} kar sakte hain.
verification_rejected: Aapki verification approve nahi hui. Reason: {reason}. Kripya documents dobara upload karein.
booking_received: Nayi booking request! {trucker_name} aapka load book karna chahta hai: {origin} → {destination}.
booking_approved: Aapki booking approve ho gayi! Load: {origin} → {destination}. Trip shuru kar sakte hain.
booking_rejected: Supplier ne aapki booking approve nahi ki. Load: {origin} → {destination}. Aur loads book kar sakte hain.
load_expired: Aapka load expire ho gaya: {origin} → {destination}. Naya load post karein truckers dhundhne ke liye.
trip_completed: Trip complete! {origin} → {destination}. Apna experience rate karein.
super_load_assigned: Aapke Super Load ke liye trucker assign ho gaya: {origin} → {destination}. Trucker: {trucker_name}.
payment_reminder: Payment reminder: Super Load {origin} → {destination}. Remaining payment {days_remaining} din mein due hai.
